Operation 'pubsub.projects.topics.delete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary entirely. Description is comprehensive but could be clearer about the permanent nature of the operation and better structured for AI agent understanding. Added emphasis on permanence and clarified the subscription behavior for better AI interpretability.

data.current_description: Deletes the topic with the given name. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic does not exist. After a topic is deleted, a new topic may be created with the same name; this is an entirely new topic with none of the old configuration or subscriptions. Existing subscriptions to this topic are not deleted, but their `topic` field is set to `_deleted-topic_`.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a topic and handle existing subscriptions
data.description_suggestion: Deletes the topic with the given name. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic does not exist. After deletion, a new topic with the same name can be created as an entirely new topic with no prior configuration or subscriptions. Existing subscriptions to the deleted topic are not removed but have their `topic` field set to `_deleted-topic_`. This operation is permanent and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is comprehensive but could be clearer about the permanent nature of the operation and better structured for AI agent understanding. Added emphasis on permanence and clarified the subscription behavior for better AI interpretability.

data.current_description: Gets the configuration of a topic.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete configuration of a topic, including its name, labels, message retention settings, schema configuration, and other metadata. Returns the Topic resource with all current settings. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic does not exist.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks detail about what configuration data is returned. Enhanced to specify the types of configuration returned and error handling for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'pubsub.projects.topics.snapshots.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing summary. Description explains snapshot purpose but lacks clarity about what is returned and pagination support. Restructured to clarify the return value and pagination capabilities for better AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Lists the names of the snapshots on this topic. Snapshots are used in [Seek](https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot.
data.summary_suggestion: List snapshots available for a topic
data.description_suggestion: Lists all snapshots associated with a topic. Snapshots capture the acknowledgment state of messages and are used in Seek operations to manage message acknowledgments in bulk across subscriptions. Returns a paginated list of snapshot names and metadata. Supports pagination through page_size and page_token parameters.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description explains snapshot purpose but lacks clarity about what is returned and pagination support. Restructured to clarify the return value and pagination capabilities for better AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Lists the names of the attached subscriptions on this topic.
data.summary_suggestion: List subscriptions attached to a topic
data.description_suggestion: Lists all subscriptions attached to a topic. Returns a paginated list of subscription names and resource identifiers. Supports pagination through page_size and page_token parameters. Only subscriptions with an active topic reference are included in the results.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is minimal and lacks information about pagination support and return format. Enhanced to include pagination details and clarify what subscriptions are returned for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Adds one or more messages to the topic. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic does not exist.
data.description_suggestion: Publishes one or more messages to a topic. Accepts a PublishRequest containing an array of PubsubMessage objects with data and optional attributes. Returns a PublishResponse with message IDs assigned to each published message. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic does not exist. Published messages are immediately available to all subscriptions attached to the topic.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks details about request/response formats and the side effect of messages becoming available to subscribers. Enhanced to specify input/output schemas and clarify the immediate availability of messages to subscribers for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Acknowledges the messages associated with the `ack_ids` in the `AcknowledgeRequest`. The Pub/Sub system can remove the relevant messages from the subscription. Acknowledging a message whose ack deadline has expired may succeed, but such a message may be redelivered later. Acknowledging a message more than once will not result in an error.
data.reasoning: Description is comprehensive and well-detailed, explaining the operation's purpose, input requirements, side effects, and edge cases. Summary is missing, which reduces AI agent interpretability. Added concise action-oriented summary.

data.current_description: Detaches a subscription from this topic. All messages retained in the subscription are dropped. Subsequent `Pull` and `StreamingPull` requests will return FAILED_PRECONDITION. If the subscription is a push subscription, pushes to the endpoint will stop.
data.reasoning: Description clearly explains the operation's purpose and side effects (message dropping, request failures, push stopping). Summary is missing. Added concise action-oriented summary for better AI agent discoverability.

message: Operation 'pubsub.projects.subscriptions.modifyAckDeadline' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary. data.current_description: Modifies the ack deadline for a specific message. This method is useful to indicate that more time is needed to process a message by the subscriber, or to make the message available for redelivery if the processing was interrupted. Note that this does not modify the subscription-level `ackDeadlineSeconds` used for subsequent messages.
data.reasoning: Description is clear and complete, explaining the operation's purpose, use cases, and important limitations. Summary is missing. Added action-oriented summary that clarifies this modifies per-message deadlines, not subscription-level settings.

message: Operation 'pubsub.projects.subscriptions.modifyPushConfig' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary. Added action-oriented summary that clearly indicates this modifies push delivery settings.

data.current_description: Modifies the `PushConfig` for a specified subscription. This may be used to change a push subscription to a pull one (signified by an empty `PushConfig`) or vice versa, or change the endpoint URL and other attributes of a push subscription. Messages will accumulate for delivery continuously through the call regardless of changes to the `PushConfig`.
data.reasoning: Description is comprehensive, explaining the operation's purpose, supported modifications, and behavior during configuration changes. Summary is missing. Added action-oriented summary that clearly indicates this modifies push delivery settings.

data.current_description: Pulls messages from the server.
data.description_suggestion: Pulls messages from the subscription. Returns a batch of messages available for processing. The caller must acknowledge received messages using the `acknowledge` method to prevent redelivery. This is a synchronous pull operation; use `StreamingPull` for continuous message streaming.
data.reasoning: Current description is extremely vague and lacks critical context. Missing information about what is returned, how to handle messages, and distinction from streaming pull. Added summary and expanded description to clarify the pull operation's purpose, return value, required follow-up actions, and relationship to StreamingPull for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'pubsub.projects.subscriptions.seek' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary. Description is comprehensive and well-structured, explaining the operation's purpose, supported seek targets (time or snapshot), use case (bulk acknowledgment management), and constraints (same topic requirement). Summary is missing. Added action-oriented summary that clearly indicates this seeks to a point in time or snapshot.

data.current_description: Seeks an existing subscription to a point in time or to a given snapshot, whichever is provided in the request. Snapshots are used in [Seek] (https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot. Note that both the subscription and the snapshot must be on the same topic.
data.summary_suggestion: Seek subscription to time or snapshot
data.reasoning: Description is comprehensive and well-structured, explaining the operation's purpose, supported seek targets (time or snapshot), use case (bulk acknowledgment management), and constraints (same topic requirement). Summary is missing. Added action-oriented summary that clearly indicates this seeks to a point in time or snapshot.

data.current_description: Lists the existing snapshots. Snapshots are used in [Seek]( https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot.
data.description_suggestion: Lists all snapshots in a specified project. message: Operation 'pubsub.projects.snapshots.delete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary. Description is overly detailed with context about Seek operations that, while informative, obscures the core action. Lacks clarity on what the operation returns (Empty response). data.current_description: Removes an existing snapshot. Snapshots are used in [Seek] (https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot. When the snapshot is deleted, all messages retained in the snapshot are immediately dropped. After a snapshot is deleted, a new one may be created with the same name, but the new one has no association with the old snapshot or its subscription, unless the same subscription is specified.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing snapshot resource. All messages retained in the snapshot are immediately dropped and cannot be recovered. After deletion, a new snapshot with the same name can be created, but it will have no association with the deleted snapshot or its original subscription unless explicitly linked to the same subscription. This operation is permanent and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is overly detailed with context about Seek operations that, while informative, obscures the core action. Lacks clarity on what the operation returns (Empty response). AI agents need a clearer statement of the action and its irreversible consequences.
